Name: Asgard Angle Head
Description:
The Asgard Angle Head is a professional-grade finisher engineered to simultaneously feather joint compound on both sides of internal 90-degree corners. Available in 2.5", 3", and 3.5" widths, these tools deliver a clean, uniform finish in a single pass, significantly reducing manual sanding. Built for high-volume production, they feature a corrosion-resistant die-cast aluminum body, stainless steel frames, and easy-roll rubber wheels to minimize friction. The patented positive ball retainer ensures a secure, reliable connection to your handle or applicator.

  • Dual-Sided Precision: Simultaneously feathers both sides of an internal corner for a symmetrical finish.
  • Durable Construction: Die-cast aluminum body with stainless steel frames and skids for job site longevity.
  • Smooth Operation: Easy-roll wheels reduce drag on wall-to-wall and wall-to-ceiling transitions.
  • Secure Fit: Patented positive ball retainer prevents accidental disconnects during use.
  • Available Sizes: 2.5" (AH25-AD), 3" (AH30-AD), and 3.5" (AH35-AD).
Short description: Professional Asgard Angle Head available in 2.5", 3", and 3.5" sizes for precise, single-pass internal corner finishing.

Name: Asgard Flat Box
Description:
The Asgard Flat Box series provides precise, consistent joint compound application for base and finish coats on flat joints and corner beads. Available in 7", 10", and 12" widths, these boxes are built from high-grade alloys to ensure longevity in demanding environments. Featuring an integrated dial mechanism for micro-adjustments to mud flow and thumb latches for rapid cleaning, Asgard Flat Boxes offer professional finishers a reliable, easy-to-maintain solution that is compatible with most standard handles.

  • Precision Metering: Integrated dial allows for fine-tuned control of compound output for consistent results.
  • Rugged Durability: Manufactured from high-strength alloys to withstand daily professional use.
  • Easy Maintenance: Quick-access thumb latches allow for fast opening and thorough cleaning.
  • Universal Compatibility: Designed to fit all major brands of flat box handles.
  • Available Sizes: 7" (EZ07-AD), 10" (EZ10-AD), and 12" (EZ12-AD) widths.

Description:

Available in 7", 10", and 12" widths, these boxes excel at delivering smooth base coats and final coats with significantly less physical effort. Constructed with a high-strength aluminum housing and a professional-grade stainless steel blade, they ensure a streak-free finish while integrating seamlessly with standard flat box handles.

  • Power-Assist Technology: Spring-loaded mechanism reduces the force required to apply compound.
  • Lightweight Aluminum: High-strength, durable housing designed for reduced weight and easier handling.
  • Superior Finish: Stainless steel blade provides consistent, smooth application to minimize sanding.

Name: Columbia Anglehead
Description:
Columbia Angleheads are the pinnacle of corner finishing technology, overbuilt for maximum durability and precision. Available in 2", 2.5", 3", and 3.5" sizes, these tools deliver a paint-ready finish that runs "like it's on ice." Designed to work perfectly behind a corner roller or for skimming on a corner box, Columbia Angleheads feather edges flawlessly on both sides of internal corners in a single pass. Machined from premium billet aluminum and high-quality steel components in Canada, they represent the ultimate in professional-grade reliability.

  • Slick Performance: Engineered for zero-drag operation, leaving a professional, paint-ready finish.
  • Robust Construction: Hand-made from U.S. billet aluminum and steel for extreme job site durability.
  • Versatile Application: Ideal for both wiping after a roller and finishing with a corner box.
  • Full Size Range: Available in 2" (2AH), 2.5" (25AH), 3" (3AH), and 3.5" (35AH) widths.
  • Canadian Precision: Machined in Columbia's state-of-the-art facility for guaranteed performance.

Description:
The Columbia 180-Grip Bent Box Handle is a versatile, high-leverage tool designed for professional drywall finishing. Featuring a unique bent design, this handle provides superior leverage on butt joints and headers while allowing for full braking capability over the entire 180-degree angle span. The advanced braking system eliminates axle slippage, ensuring cleaner and more efficient compound application. Available in lengths from 36" to 72", these handles are built from heavy-duty billet aluminum for years of rugged job site use.

  • 180-Degree Braking: Full braking control at any angle to prevent slippage and improve precision.
  • High-Leverage Bent Design: Provides increased power and control, especially on butt joints and high walls.
  • Rugged Billet Aluminum: Extra-strong construction for long-term durability with minimal moving parts.

Name: Columbia Automatic Flat Box
Description:
The Columbia Automatic Assist Flat Box is engineered to maximize efficiency and reduce operator fatigue. Available in 8", 10", 12", and 14" sizes, these boxes feature an integrated axle and pressure plate system that automates mud application, requiring only a light push to operate. Precision metering adjustments ensure a top-quality finish on butt joints and flat seams. Built from handcrafted U.S. billet aluminum and steel, these boxes include an ultra-reliable door plate wiper and a bead wheel for axle protection, ensuring long-term reliability and a flawless finish every time.

  • Automatic Assist: Engaging axle reduces push effort by 50%, ideal for vertical joints and long shifts.
  • Precision Metering: Adjustable compound regulation for consistent, high-quality finishing.
  • Rugged Billet Build: Hand-made construction with premium materials for extreme job site durability.
  • Enhanced Reliability: New door plate wiper resists expansion and deterioration for longer service intervals.
  • Available Sizes: 8" (8FFBA), 10" (10FFBA), 12" (12FFBA), and 14" (14FFBA).
Short description: Columbia Automatic Assist Flat Box (8"–14") for effortless, professional drywall finishing. Reduces push effort by 50% with precision mud metering.

Name: Columbia Gooseneck
Description:
The Columbia Gooseneck is a professional-grade stainless steel attachment designed for efficient compound transfer from your loading pump to an automatic taper. Available in standard and Tallboy configurations, these goosenecks feature rubber covers on the horseshoe to protect your taper's finish during filling. Engineered for high-volume production, they provide a secure, leak-free connection and long-term resistance to corrosion.

  • Taper Protection: Integrated rubber horseshoe covers prevent damage to automatic tapers during refills.
  • Heavy-Duty Stainless Steel: Built for extreme durability and long-term rust resistance.
  • High-Flow Design: Optimized for rapid, mess-free compound transfer.
  • Available Models: Standard Gooseneck (GN) and Tall Boy Gooseneck (TBGN).
  • Canadian Quality: Machined in Canada using premium U.S. materials.

Name: Columbia Inside Track Fat Boy Flat Box
Description:
The Columbia Inside Track Fat Boy Flat Box is a high-capacity tool engineered for specialized finishing in tight areas, such as corner bead, butt joints, and around ceiling pot lights. Available in 8", 10", and 12" widths, the Inside Track design holds 30% more compound than standard boxes, reducing trips to the pump. These boxes are compatible with all leading flat box brake handles and feature a quick-clean design that allows access to the interior without removing the pressure plate. Hand-made from U.S. billet aluminum and steel, they are the professional choice for tricky architectural areas.

  • Specialized Geometry: Inside Track design makes finishing bead and pot light areas simpler and faster.
  • 30% More Capacity: Fat Boy reservoir reduces refill downtime and increases daily output.
  • Quick Clean: Convenient access for easy cleaning without full disassembly.
  • Universal Handle Fit: Compatible with all major drywall flat box finisher brake handles.
  • Available Sizes: 8" (8ITFB), 10" (10ITFB), and 12" (12ITFB).
Short description: Columbia Inside Track Fat Boy Flat Box (8"–12") with 30% more capacity. Optimized for bead, pot lights, and tricky finishing areas.

Name: Columbia Nailspotter
Description:
The Columbia Nailspotter is a professional-grade tool designed to automate the finishing of fastener heads with speed and precision. Available in 2" and 3" widths, these spotters feature a lightweight billet aluminum construction and an adjustable thumb screw for fine-tuning swivel tension. Unique to the Columbia design is the option to utilize wheels for smooth tracking or the traditional skid plate for standard operation. Engineered for high-volume production, the Columbia Nailspotter is widely regarded as the most efficient and versatile spotter on the market.

  • Dual Tracking Options: Choose between wheels for low-friction movement or a traditional skid plate.
  • Swivel Control: Easy-to-adjust thumb screw allows for precise tensioning of the tool head.
  • Lightweight Billet: Constructed from premium aluminum for reduced operator fatigue and extreme durability.
  • Professional Finish: Fills and wipes fastener heads in a single, clean pass.
  • Available Sizes: 2" (2NS) and 3" (3NS).

These interchangeable blades are crafted from professional-grade stainless steel, providing the perfect flex for wiping down tape or achieving high-quality wall and ceiling finishes.   • Stainless Steel Performance: High-grade steel provides optimal flex and resistance to abrasion.

Name: Columbia Standard Corner Flusher
Description:
Columbia Standard Corner Flushers represent a professional advancement in angle finishing, designed to deliver a flawless, ready-to-paint finish. Available in 2.5", 3", and 3.5" widths, each unit is hand-ground and checked on a granite plate to ensure absolute precision. These flushers are built from high-grade U.S. aluminum and steel, offering extreme durability for daily use. Every unit comes standard with wheels for low-friction movement and includes an Allen key for those who prefer to operate without them.

  • Precision Hand-Ground: Individually verified on a granite plate for perfect corner geometry.
  • Ready-to-Paint Finish: Engineered to smooth joint compound with zero drag for professional results.
  • Fluid Movement: Integrated wheels provide a smooth glide across walls and ceilings.
  • Rugged Build: Hand-made from U.S. billet aluminum and steel, machined in Canada.
  • Available Sizes: 2.5" (25SF), 3" (3SF), and 3.5" (35SF).

Name: Columbia Sabre Smoothing Blade
Description:
The Columbia Sabre Smoothing Blade is a lightweight, high-performance skimming tool designed for professional drywall finishers. Featuring a high-quality plastic body that is approximately 60% lighter than traditional billet aluminum models, the Sabre offers superior maneuverability and control without compromising on finish quality. Available in a comprehensive range of sizes from 7" to 48", it utilizes a hardened stainless steel blade with rounded anti-trace edges to deliver flawlessly smooth surfaces. Whether used by hand or with an extension pole via the Sabre Claw adapter, the Sabre provides an ergonomic and affordable solution for large-scale finishing projects.

  • Ultra-Lightweight Design: 60% lighter than aluminum blades to significantly reduce operator fatigue.
  • Precision Finish: Hardened stainless steel blade with Bi-Flex technology for enhanced control.
  • Anti-Trace Edges: Rounded corners minimize lines and imperfections during skimming.
  • Versatile Range: Available in 10 sizes: 7", 10", 12", 14", 16", 18", 24", 32", 40", and 48".
  • Flexible Use: Compatible with manual use or extension poles via the Sabre Claw (SBC) adapter.

Name: Columbia Tomahawk Smoothing Blade
Description:
The Columbia Tomahawk Smoothing Blade is the most durable skimming tool on the market, engineered for professional contractors who demand stability and precision. Machined from solid U.S. billet aluminum, the Tomahawk features an interchangeable stainless steel blade system that eliminates the risk of snapping under pressure. Available in 9 sizes from 7" to 48", these blades integrate with standard flat box handles or the Columbia One handle via the Tomalock adapter. This system provides unmatched stability and allows for precise adjustments to the angle of attack while in motion, delivering a superior, paint-ready finish.

  • Billet Aluminum Body: Solid construction for maximum stability and long-term durability.
  • Interchangeable Blades: Replace only the stainless steel blade when worn, extending the life of the tool body.
  • High-Stability Control: Compatible with flat box handles for superior leverage and angle adjustment.
  • Versatile Range: Available in sizes: 7", 10", 12", 14", 18", 24", 32", 40", and 48".
  • Canadian Precision: Machined in Columbia's state-of-the-art facility for guaranteed performance.

Name: Platinum Flat Box Handle
Description:
The Platinum Flat Box Handle series delivers precise control and leverage for professional drywall finishing. Constructed from high-strength, lightweight anodized aluminum, these handles are optimized for a variety of tasks including wall work, closets, and ceiling applications. The integrated braking system provides responsive, consistent adjustment of the box angle, ensuring uniform compound application and clean joints. Available in fixed lengths of 34", 42", and 54", these handles are designed for universal compatibility with most major industry flat boxes.

  • Lightweight Aluminum: High-strength anodized frame reduces operator fatigue during long shifts.
  • Responsive Braking: Precise control over flat box positioning for consistent mud application.
  • Ergonomic Grip: Adjustable handle grip accommodates various hand sizes for improved leverage.
  • Universal Compatibility: Fits seamlessly with all major industry-standard flat finishing boxes.
  • Available Lengths: 34" (PT-BH34), 42" (PT-BH42), and 54" (PT-BH54).

Name: Platinum Angle Head Corner Finisher with Wheels
Description:
The Platinum Angle Head Corner Finisher streamlines internal corner finishing by simultaneously applying and feathering joint compound on both sides of a 90-degree corner. Available in 2.5", 3", and 3.5" widths, these finishers feature a durable high-grade cast aluminum body and an integrated wheel system that ensures fluid, low-drag movement. Engineered for high-volume job sites, they eliminate repetitive manual passes and provide a sharp, uniform edge that requires minimal sanding. These units integrate seamlessly with standard corner rollers, boxes, and angle head handles.

  • Precision Corner Finishing: Simultaneously coats and feathers both sides for a clean, professional edge.
  • Low-Friction Wheels: Integrated wheel system ensures smooth operation and reduces operator fatigue.
  • Cast Aluminum Body: High-grade construction provides long-term site reliability and durability.
  • System Compatibility: Works with standard industry corner rollers and applicator handles.
  • Available Sizes: 2.5" (PT-CF2.5), 3" (PT-3CF), and 3.5" (PT-CF3.5).

Name: Platinum Compound Tube
Description:
The Platinum Compound Tube series offers a high-capacity, semi-automatic delivery system for joint compound on drywall seams and corners. Functioning as a precision syringe, these tubes enable rapid loading directly from compound buckets, eliminating manual pan-and-knife labor while ensuring uniform material distribution. Available in 24", 36", and 42" lengths, they provide the perfect balance of mud capacity and maneuverability for various job site conditions. Constructed from high-grade materials for daily professional use, they accept a wide range of applicator heads for both flat and corner finishing.

  • Rapid Loading: Efficient suction system allows for fast, clean refills directly from compound containers.
  • High-Efficiency Output: Delivers a consistent ribbon of compound to accelerate finishing workflows.
  • Modular Design: Compatible with various applicator heads for maximum job site versatility.
  • Durable Construction: Engineered to withstand heavy-duty use in professional environments.
  • Available Lengths: 24" (PT-CT24), 36" (PT-CT36), and 42" (PT-CT42).

Description:
The Platinum Flat Finishing Box series automates joint compound application and edge feathering on flat and butt joints in a single pass. Available in 8", 10", 12", and 14" widths, these boxes are designed for high-output professional environments. Featuring a pivoting axle that maintains constant contact with the wall and an integrated crown adjustment dial, they provide a uniform, paint-ready surface with minimal effort. Built with high-grade materials to withstand the rigors of daily job site use, Platinum Flat Boxes significantly reduce manual labor and sanding time.

  • One-Pass Finishing: Simultaneously dispenses compound and feathers edges for professional results.
  • Adjustable Crown Control: Dedicated dial allows for precise thickness regulation based on coat requirements.
  • Pivoting Axle: Ensures smooth operation and consistent mud flow on uneven drywall surfaces.
  • Rugged Construction: Built for long-term durability in high-volume professional settings.
  • Available Sizes: 8" (PT-8FB), 10" (PT-10FB), 12" (PT-FB12), and 14" (PT-14FB).

Name: Platinum Nail Spotter
Description:
The Platinum Nail Spotter is a professional-grade tool designed to automate the coating of fastener heads in one efficient pass. Available in 2" and 3" widths, these spotters eliminate tedious manual labor by providing uniform coverage and a clean, flush finish. Constructed from high-grade anodized aluminum, the tool features a precision-hardened steel blade and a high-performance urethane door seal to prevent leaks. An integrated smooth-glide wheel system ensures steady tracking across walls and ceilings, significantly reducing sanding requirements and material waste.

  • High Efficiency: Rapidly coats entire rows of fastener heads in a single, consistent pass.
  • Durable Build: Anodized aluminum frame and hardened steel blade for extreme site longevity.
  • Leak-Resistant: Urethane door seal maintains internal pressure and prevents compound bypass.
  • Fluid Tracking: Precision wheel system ensures smooth, controlled movement on all surfaces.

Name: TapeTech Corner Applicator
Description:
The TapeTech Corner Applicator is a high-efficiency tool designed to supply joint compound to Corner Finishers for fast, professional internal corner finishing. Available in 7" and 8" sizes, it can also be used with Applicator Heads for installing paper-faced corner bead on both internal and external angles. Featuring a robust stainless steel nose cone for long-term durability and a D-shaped handle fitting to prevent unwanted rotation, this applicator ensures a consistent flow of compound and reduces the need for frequent refills during high-volume production.

  • High-Capacity Reservoir: Optimized for longer runs and fewer trips to the pump.
  • Durable Stainless Steel Cone: Resists wear and corrosion for reliable daily operation.
  • Anti-Rotation Interface: D-shaped handle fitting ensures a secure, non-slip connection.
  • Versatile Application: Compatible with angle heads and mud heads for multiple finishing tasks.
  • Available Sizes: 7" (CA07TT) and 8" (CA08TT).

TapeTech Cove Applicator Heads are engineered to apply a precise bead of gypsum cove adhesive for optimal installation of cornices and coves. Designed to work with industry-standard sizes including 55mm, 75mm, 83mm, and 90mm, these heads ensure the adhesive is placed exactly where needed for a secure bond. They attach securely to all TapeTech Corner Applicators and are ideally suited for use with Compound Tubes to streamline the installation of Gyprock™, Gyproc™, and GIB-Cove™ products.

TapeTech Premium Compound Rollers are the ultimate alternative to sprayers for applying large volumes of joint compound. Available in 4", 9", and 12" widths, these rollers feature a 18mm high-quality reticulated polypropylene nap that holds 50% more compound than standard rollers. Designed for use with TapeTech's robust 5/16" thick roller frames, they provide the highest coverage rate per load. Name: TapeTech EasyFinish® Box Handle
Description:
The TapeTech EasyFinish® Box Handle series features an ergonomic bent handle design that provides superior leverage and control for professional drywall finishing. Available in lengths from 34" to 72", these handles are specifically recommended for use with Power Assist® boxes, as the bent geometry helps activate the assist mechanism with less effort. Name: TapeTech EasyClean® Finishing Box
Description:
The TapeTech EasyClean® Finishing Box is the industry standard for automatically dispensing joint compound and feathering edges on flat and butt joints in a single pass. Available in 7", 10", and 12" widths, these boxes feature an adjustable crown setting dial that allows the user to regulate mud application thickness for base and finish coats. The integrated pivoting axle compensates for surface irregularities, ensuring constant wall contact and professional results. Built with the EasyClean® design, the cover plate can be opened quickly for thorough maintenance and rapid job site cleanup.

  • Precise Mud Control: Adjustable crown dial regulates compound flow for first, second, and third coats.
  • Pivoting Axle: Automatically adjusts to uneven drywall surfaces to maintain consistent results.
  • EasyClean® Design: Rapid-access cover plate simplifies cleaning and routine maintenance.
  • Professional Efficiency: Simultaneously dispenses and feathers compound to reduce sanding time.
  • Available Sizes: 7" (EZ07TT), 10" (EZ10TT), and 12" (EZ12TT).
Short description: Professional TapeTech EasyClean® Finishing Box (7"–12") with adjustable crown control and pivoting axle for flawless, single-pass joint finishing.

Name: TapeTech MAXXBOX®
Description:
TapeTech MAXXBOX® Finishing Boxes are the industry's first high-capacity boxes designed with an optimized capacity-to-weight ratio. Available in 7", 10", and 12" widths, they provide significantly more usable compound for first and second coats—where volume is critical—without the excessive weight required for finish coats. The 7" MAXXBOX® delivers 94% more usable capacity than standard boxes. Featuring a pivoting axle to compensate for uneven surfaces and an adjustable crown dial for precise compound metering, the MAXXBOX® ensures a flawless, feathered finish on every joint.

  • Maximum Mud Capacity: Holds up to 94% more usable compound for high-volume filling stages.
  • Optimized Weight: Engineered to provide volume where needed without compromising maneuverability.
  • Pivoting Axle: Automatically adjusts to surface irregularities for consistent wall contact.
  • Precision Dial: Adjustable crown setting regulates mud output for flawless feathering.
  • Available Sizes: 7" (MAXX07TT), 10" (MAXX10TT), and 12" (MAXX12TT).
Short description: High-capacity TapeTech MAXXBOX® (7"–12") for efficient drywall finishing. Optimized capacity-to-weight ratio provides more mud for fill coats with less fatigue.

Name: TapeTech EasyClean® Nail Spotter
Description:
The TapeTech EasyClean® Nail Spotter is a professional-grade solution for efficiently finishing fastener indentations on walls and ceilings. Available in 2" and 3" widths, this tool is engineered to fill the depressions left by nail or screw heads and wipe away excess compound in a single, fluid pass. It features a high-quality stainless steel body and a hardened steel skid plate that identifies improperly set fasteners while protecting the blade from damage. The EasyClean® lid system allows for rapid disassembly and thorough maintenance, ensuring the tool remains in peak operating condition. Designed for versatility, it is fully compatible with TapeTech FHTT fiberglass and XHTT extension handles.

  • Dual-Pass Efficiency: Fills and finishes fastener heads simultaneously to accelerate project timelines.
  • Blade Protection: Hardened steel skid plate prevents damage from protruding fasteners and ensures smooth gliding.
  • EasyClean® Technology: Quick-release latch and gasket design for effortless cleanup and maintenance.
  • Available Sizes: 2" (NS02TT) and 3" (NS03TT) widths to match specific finishing requirements.
  • System Compatibility: Works seamlessly with standard TapeTech support handles via the NSA-TT adapter.
Short description: Professional TapeTech EasyClean® Nail Spotter available in 2" and 3" sizes. Features a hardened steel skid plate and EasyClean® lid for efficient, one-pass fastener finishing.

Name: TapeTech Premium Finishing Knife
Description:
The TapeTech Premium Finishing Knife (PFK) is the gold standard for professional wipe-down and skimming applications. Engineered with high-grade INOX German stainless steel, these knives feature a unique flexible blade that delivers the absolute best finish in the drywall industry. The secret to their performance lies in the precise fulcrum point designed into the grip area, providing unmatched control and tactile feedback. Available in widths ranging from 7" to 48", the PFK series is optimized for everything from tight corner work to large-scale wall and ceiling skimming. The ergonomic handle reduces operator fatigue during long shifts, making it the preferred choice for high-volume drywall contractors.

  • Replaceable Components: Compatible with PFB replacement blades to extend the service life of the tool.
  • Professional Performance: Ideal for wiping down tape and applying final skim coats with precision.

Name: TapeTech QuickBox® QSX
Description:
The TapeTech QuickBox® QSX is the industry's first finishing box specifically engineered for use with fast-setting (hot) joint compounds. Constructed from advanced, glass-filled polypropylene, the shell provides a slick, ultra-durable surface that allows even dried hot mud to fall out with a few light taps. Available in 6.5" and 8.5" widths, the QuickBox® QSX features an optimized blade design that eliminates the need for complex crown adjustments. This tool allows contractors to combine the speed of a finishing box with the rapid turnaround of chemical-set compounds, making it ideal for first-coat applications over joint tape. It is compatible with all standard finishing box handles, including the TapeTech Wizard®.

  • Hot Mud Optimized: Advanced space-age materials prevent fast-setting compound from sticking to the tool.
  • Rapid Cleanup: Compound easily releases from the shell, significantly reducing maintenance time.
  • Fixed Blade Design: Optimized geometry matches the application, removing the need for crown settings.
  • Tool-Less Blade Change: Blades can be swapped in seconds to maintain a clean finish.
  • Available Sizes: 6.5" (QB06-QSX) and 8.5" (QB08-QSX) widths.
Short description: TapeTech QuickBox® QSX (6.5" or 8.5") designed for fast-setting joint compounds. Features a non-stick polypropylene shell for rapid hot mud application and cleanup.

Name: TapeTech Premium Gold Stainless Steel Finishing Trowel
Description:
TapeTech Premium Gold Stainless Steel Finishing Trowels are the workhorse of the professional's tool kit, designed for the perfect finish on drywall, plaster, EIFS, and stucco. Featuring a 0.65mm blade thickness, these trowels provide the ideal balance of rigidity and flexibility for base and finish coats. The blades are manufactured from triple-hardened European stainless steel for maximum durability and rust resistance. Each trowel is equipped with an ergonomic ProSoft handle that is slip-resistant and designed to reduce operator fatigue during extended use. Available in lengths ranging from 11" to 18", these trowels deliver consistent, professional results across all finishing applications.

  • 0.65mm Blade Thickness: Optimized for durability and performance as a primary finishing workhorse.
  • Triple-Hardened Steel: Premium European gold stainless steel for long life and corrosion resistance.
  • ProSoft Grip: Ergonomic, slip-resistant handle for all-day comfort and control.
  • Precision Finish: Ground edges and rounded corners to prevent tracking and lines.
  • Available Sizes: 11"x5", 12"x5", 14"x5", 16"x5", and 18"x5".
